    T

    t - Variable in class application.StudentQAPage.EventRecord
     
    tabPane - Variable in class application.StudentQAPage
     
    testAnswerValidationNullContent() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Verifies that the Answer constructor throws an IllegalArgumentException when provided with null content.
    testCloseQuestion() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests the functionality of closing a question without selecting a specific answer.
    testCreateAnswerEmptyContent() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Create answer with no content (Invalid)
    testCreateAnswerInvalidContentTooLong() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Create answer with too many characters (Invalid)
    testCreateAnswerInvalidContentTooShort() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Create answer with too few characters (Invalid)
    testCreateQuestionEmptyContent() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that empty content is not allowed.
    testCreateQuestionEmptyTitle() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that an empty title is not allowed.
    testCreateQuestionInvalidContentTooLong() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that content longer than 2000 characters is rejected.
    testCreateQuestionInvalidContentTooShort() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that content shorter than 10 characters is rejected.
    testCreateQuestionInvalidTitleTooLong() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that a title longer than 200 characters is rejected.
    testCreateQuestionInvalidTitleTooShort() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that a title shorter than 5 characters is rejected.
    testCreateValidAnswer() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Create valid answer
    testCreateValidQuestion() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests successful creation of a question with valid title and content.
    testDeleteAnswer() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Delete answer
    testDeleteQuestion() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Delete question
    testDeleteQuestionByWrongUser() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Delete question by wrong user
    testGetAllQuestionsForUser() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Get all questions for user
    testGetUnresolvedQuestions() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Get unresolved questions only
    testMarkAnswerAsRead() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Mark answer as read
    testMarkQuestionResolved() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Mark question as resolved with specific answer
    testQuestionDeletionCascade() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that deleting a question deletes all of its answers.
    testQuestionValidationNullTitle() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Verifies that the Question constructor throws an IllegalArgumentException when provided with a null title.
    testReadAnswersForQuestion() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Read answers for a question
    testReadNonExistentQuestion() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that attempting to read a question that doesn't exist returns null.
    testReadQuestionById() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that a question can be read by its id.
    testSearchQuestions() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Search questions by keyword
    testUnreadAnswerCount() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Verifies that the unread answer count for a question is accurate and updates.
    testUpdateAnswer() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Update answer content
    testUpdateQuestion() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Tests that a question title and content can be updated.
    testUpdateQuestionInvalidTitle() - Method in class application.QASystemTest
    Test: Update question with invalid title.
